title: OPRT Stock Earnings: Oportun Financial Beats EPS for Q2 of 2024
text: Oportun Financial (NASDAQ: OPRT) exceeded expectations in Q2 2024. The company reported earnings per share of 8 cents, which surpassed analyst predictions of -15 cents per share. Revenue reached $250.40 million, exceeding the analyst estimate of $246.05 million by approximately 1.77%. The earnings beat represents a significant positive surprise, as analysts had anticipated a loss rather than profitability. This outperformance on both the top and bottom lines suggests stronger operational performance than the market had anticipated heading into the quarter.
